Title: User Registration
Test Data: Valid email, password, and confirm password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Register activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Confirm the password
5. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: User should be registered successfully and redirected to the login page

Title: Invalid Email Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Register activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Confirm the password
5. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating an invalid email format

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Login activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter the registered email address
3. Enter the registered password
4. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: User should be logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard

Title: Invalid Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Login activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter an incorrect email address
3. Enter an incorrect password
4. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating incorrect credentials

Title: Manage Newsletters
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Newsletter activity" from the U-environment
2. Select the newsletter to subscribe or unsubscribe
3. Click on the "Subscribe" or "Unsubscribe" button
Expected Result: User's subscription status should be updated accordingly

Title: Create Event
Test Data: Event name, date, time, location, description
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Create event" activity from the U-environment
2. Fill in the event details (name, date, time, location, description)
3. Click on the "Create" button
Expected Result: Event should be created successfully and displayed in the list of events

Title: Join/View Event
Preconditions: Event exists and user is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Join/View event" activity from the U-environment
2. Select the event to join or view
3. Click on the "Join" or "View" button
Expected Result: User should be able to join or view the selected event

Title: Manage User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Profile" activity from the U-environment
2. Update the profile information (name, email, password)
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: User's profile information should be updated successfully

Title: Edge Case - Empty Email During Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Register activity" from the U-environment
2. Leave the email field empty
3. Enter a valid password
4. Confirm the password
5. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating an empty email field

Title: Edge Case - Empty Password During Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Register activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Leave the password field empty
4. Confirm the password
5. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating an empty password field

Title: Edge Case - Mismatched Passwords During Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Register activity" from the U-environment
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a different password in the confirmation field
5. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating mismatched passwords
